title: How much does the public of EVA know
display_title: How much does the public of EVA know
wikitext:
[]: How much does the public of EVA know?             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Mon Oct 01, 2007 10:58 pm I've been thinking about this for a while. Exactly how much does the general public of the Eva universe know? It's stated that Second Impact was covered up by numerous organizations and goverments and that the accepted explination is a meteor striking Antartica. But what then about the current Angels that attack almost weekly? It would seem that the public is told that they are simply renegade beasts of unknown origin and they simply stop them to simply prevent property damage. However it would appear that the people of Tokyo 3 know that stopping the Angels will somehow prevent another major catacylsim, despite the Angels having no connection to the previous cataculism in the publics eyes. So exactly how much does the general public know about the Angels?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Oct 01, 2007 11:05 pm The CI explains this pretty well with its "general knowledge", though that may only apply to general members of NERV.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Mon Oct 01, 2007 11:05 pm NAveryW wrote: The CI explains this pretty well with its "general knowledge", though that may only apply to general members of NERV.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Oct 01, 2007 11:07 pm Classified Information from the NGE2 PS2/PSP game. It sheds a lot of light into things that Anno had always planned, but never actually got mentioned in the actual series, the most prominent of which being the First Ancestral Race. Despite the fact that it was advised by Anno himself, some people refuse to accept it, though.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Mon Oct 01, 2007 11:08 pm NAveryW wrote: Classified Information from the NGE2 PS2/PSP game. It sheds a lot of light into things that Anno had always planned, but never actually got mentioned in the actual series, the most prominent of which being the First Ancestral Race. Despite the fact that it was advised by Anno himself, some people refuse to accept it, though.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Oct 01, 2007 11:13 pm It's all translated and online somewhere around here... >_>

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Oct 01, 2007 11:15 pm I think this sums it up nicely. NGE2 CI wrote: 15. Angel A. Publicly Released Information Data unavailable.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Mon Oct 01, 2007 11:42 pm Well, the CI doesnt give much information, as you said it only says "Publicly Released Information: Data unavailable" on a number of things. So what DID they tell the public.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Oct 01, 2007 11:49 pm My guess would be anything ranging from utter bullshit to absolutely nothing depending on the topic.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Mon Oct 01, 2007 11:53 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: My guess would be anything ranging from utter bullshit to absolutely nothing depending on the topic.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Oct 02, 2007 12:15 am SEELE does have a habit of killing people that don't see things there way. If you ask too many questions and get on their bad side you disapear. If you intimidate enought people that others will believe you can make up anything you want.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Tue Oct 02, 2007 12:40 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: SEELE does have a habit of killing people that don't see things there way. If you ask too many questions and get on their bad side you disapear. If you intimidate enought people that others will believe you can make up anything you want.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Oct 02, 2007 12:55 am They said something about censorship in episode 02 so who knows. Maybe they went as far as saying they're aliens, maybe they didn't. They were in a position to make up anything they wanted to. COMMITTEEMAN B: Precisely. Now that the Angels, and the fact that we have been manipulating information, have become public knowledge, Nerv must operate in a speedy and prudent manner. IKARI: It's already been taken care of. You may rest assured of that. ------------- Misato: So it's public scenario B-22. MAN B: In response to reporters' questions... Misato: So, we're hushing up the truth again?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Oct 02, 2007 4:27 pm After an Angel attack at one point, you hear something about terrorist strikes on the radio. That's probably a coverup, though it does contradict the "Angels being common knowledge" thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Oct 02, 2007 5:42 pm It's not the coverup. RADIO: Hi! I'm doing fine, but the world is worrisome due to terrorism in the Nansa Islands. This year long heat creates some crazy bastards, you know?

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Tue Oct 02, 2007 7:00 pm This seems like a huge plothole. Something way too big for EVA. They must have told the public something, what with all the Tax dollars (or yen) going to make giant robots to fight these things.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Oct 02, 2007 7:08 pm It's not a plot hole it's just not something they bothered with. The rest of the world is largely ignored in NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Oct 02, 2007 7:17 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: It's not the coverup. RADIO: Hi! I'm doing fine, but the world is worrisome due to terrorism in the Nansa Islands. This year long heat creates some crazy bastards, you know?

[]:             Quote Post by Hailtheplatypus » Tue Oct 02, 2007 8:53 pm They more than likely explained it, but due to the fact that the explaination didnt effect the characters more than Misato's conversation with Ritsuko over what intelegence was doing.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Oct 02, 2007 11:33 pm Like all shady organizations, NERV probably lets the public "know" a combination of cover stories and half-truths. In other words: jack shit.
